channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Fly-tipping, 13th July
item.description:
Please remove this

Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned shopping trolley, 13th July
item.description:
A shopping trolley has been abandoned on the edge of the green at the junction of Tillingbourne Green and Trentham Drive. It is a danger to traffic and could cause damage to residents vehicles.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 107, Tillingbourne Green, Poverest, Orpington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Plenty of litter next to Alan's plants, 13th July
item.description:
Please clean that corner - is had not been cleaned fof months now

Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Ongoing Fly-tipping under the bridge, 13th July
item.description:
Hi, Please collect these items as soon as possible - they have been there for months and I reported it several times by now Best

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Woolwich Road, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abanded furniture - please remove, 13th July
item.description:
Hi there, One of the households abanded old sofa on the pedestrian pavement - please collect it. Best, Lidia

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Woolwich Road, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken brick pier at estate entrance, 13th July
item.description:
The brick pier with top planter located at the estate entrance has been hit and damaged. It needs rebuilding. The top concrete planter re instated. It is in the area by no 20 wb bay window.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Warburton Street, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street litter, 13th July
item.description:
Waste by customers of nearby takeaways dumping their waste on the street Pizza boxes Takeaway boxes General sweep needed
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Kelvin Road, Welling, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Big black bag and Sofa dumped in front of 3 Willrose Close, 13th July
item.description:
A big black bag and Sofa dumped in front of 3 Willrose Close. This is blighting our street. Please can these be removed. Thank you. It is likely that the occupants dumped these items there, without caring how it affects the street.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Willrose Crescent, Abbey Wood
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bikes abandoned on roadway on yellow line (also bus route) blocking driveway and access illegally, 13th July
item.description:
Two Forrest Bikes on roadway - outside designated area, with space.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 92, Canfield Gardens, South Hampstead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping outside 51 Maury, 13th July
item.description:
Misc household waste outside 51 Maury garage. Frequent flytipping spot.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Maury Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 13th July
item.description:
Several items abandoned, pieces of furniture, plants, pots, a trolley full of rubbish, etc. They were disposed of yesterday evening or this early morning. Along Denham Street I noticed also an oven (or similar) left on the pavement.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Tunnel Avenue, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 13th July
item.description:
On the car club space on Burbage road

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, Burbage Road, Dulwich Village, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Forest bikes blocking crossing, 13th July
item.description:
Please stop forest bikes parking over this section of pavement. They block crossings which cause a safety risk for school children. Please resolve this issue

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 210, Venner Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Blocked drain, 13th July
item.description:
This drain has been blocked for over a year, it is a hazard when it rains

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Dunbar Avenue, Elmers End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 13th July
item.description:
Obstruction of the pavement

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cambridge Avenue, Falconwood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Another 2 mattresses, 13th July
item.description:
Unless you enforce fines. Behaviour will never change. Another 2 mattresses dumped on the street by residents of the flats and hmo. Do something about it

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 115, Bellegrove Road, Welling, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped rubbish, 13th July
item.description:
Sofa boxes and garden waste dumped by resident on the street

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Woodbourne Avenue, Streatham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Water melon skips, 13th July
item.description:
Dumped water melon crates which are increasing in each week

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Woodbourne Avenue, Streatham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bulky furniture discarded on the street, 13th July
item.description:
Bulky furniture had been discarded on the street and is inviting loitering

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Peckham Grove, Old Kent Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Top of john street, going o. To theobalds toad, 13th July
item.description:
Metal bollard damaged and detached from pavement. Tripping g hazard

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): John Street, Holborn, Greater London
